channel.title: Blogs on Braeden Silver - Portfolio and Blog
channel.description: Recent content in Blogs on Braeden Silver - Portfolio and Blog

item.title: Macro Photography: A Beginner's Guide to Gear, Focus Stacking, and Techniques
item.description: Macro Photography: A Beginner’s Guide to Gear, Focus Stacking, and Techniques Macro photography is the art of capturing the tiny, often-overlooked details of the world around us. From the intricate textures of a dragonfly’s wing to the fine details of everyday objects, macro photography allows you to see the world up close like never before. In this guide, we’ll cover macro photography basics, essential gear recommendations, lighting setups, focus stacking software, lens suggestions, and popular genres to help you get started on your macro journey.

item.title: Welcome to My Blog
item.description: Welcome to My Blog! Hey, I’m Braeden. I’m into macro and black-and-white photography, and I’m all about blending art, tech, and business. This blog will cover everything I’m passionate about, from photography techniques and gear reviews to engineering projects, business tips, and practical tutorials. I’m currently a business student with a lot of other interests. What to Expect Here’s what I’ll be sharing: Photography: Especially macro and black-and-white shots. Macro is my favorite type of photography because it lets me see things on a micro-scale that our eyes usually miss.
